description:
Advanced keyboard shortcut manager for Windows with an IPC backend and modern React UI.

KeyMaster Pro is a powerful keyboard shortcut manager for Windows built with Tauri v2, React 19, and Rust.
Features include global hotkey registration, named pipe IPC communication, system tray integration,
auto-updates via Tauri updater, and a sleek modern interface with dark mode support.
KeyMaster Pro release v0.2.0. See changes in CHANGELOG.md.
